items.title: BeXide announces Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators for Switch 2, Switch, and PC
items.desc: BeXide has announced Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators, a revival of the 1995-released SEGA Saturn game by KAZe. It will launch for Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam in 2026.
